summary: First-finish smoke test of TechAssist Pro. Backend contact API (POST valid/invalid email/missing fields, GET list, sorted newest first, GET /api/, /api/status) all working. Frontend all pages load with correct data-testids, all 6 service cards render, 6 industries with stats, About has 4 values + 4 team, Home renders with hero+CTA, Contact form submits successfully and shows contact-success block (persisted to Mongo, confirmed via GET), empty submit correctly shows sonner error toast and does not persist, mobile menu toggle opens navigation, footer renders on all pages, navbar links navigate correctly.
passed: GET /api/ returns TechAssist Pro API message (200)
POST /api/contact valid payload -> 201 with id + created_at
POST /api/contact invalid email -> 422 with EmailStr validation error
GET /api/contact returns array sorted newest first, includes newly created inquiries
Home / renders with data-testid=page-home and CTA to /contact
Services page renders all 6 service cards (managed-it, cloud-services, cybersecurity, network-support, data-backup, help-desk)
Industries page renders 6 industries each with stats block (industry-stat-* count 12)
Contact form valid submit -> contact-success block visible AND persisted in Mongo (verified via follow-up GET)
Contact form empty submit -> error toast shown, contact-success NOT shown
Mobile viewport nav-menu-toggle opens mobile menu with nav links
